message:
chore(beads): file axxrd/ucyju/udxzg/zhmuc — conformance gaps

Filed by CONFORMANCE auditor (cod_4 / SunnyMoose) after auditing
crates/fcp-conformance/tests/ against docs/protocol + ADRs:

- axxrd: fcp-oauth OAuth2 + PKCE (RFC 6749 §4.1 + RFC 7636)
- ucyju: fcp-ratelimit TokenBucket algorithmic invariants
- udxzg: fcp-sandbox WASI isolation boundary invariants
- zhmuc: fcp-mesh gossip + IBLT + admission invariants

Each bead cites its spec source and lists proposed test structure
+ DoD. Simple gap (session suite negotiation) landed separately
as commit c9b822f4.
